semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all seven exact source mappings, the schema record, three-valid/six-invalid synthetic trace, all five external Circle structural receipt slices and their no-promotion boundaries, both proof targets, all six CoilAttentionMemory theorem declarations, every manifest atom, every prose candidate, test plan, source crosswalk, summary, and handoff. The sweep made the memory-object-, state-version-, request-, consumer-, workload-, structural-axis-, budget-, and time-specific State-Carry and Recurrence Admission Lease the distinct owner; expanded it to eighteen mechanisms, twelve interfaces, eighteen invariants, and eighteen failure modes; preserved zero chapter-core effect; and froze the natural-workload, matched-baseline, joint-burden, causal, independent-reproduction, and transfer campaign.

scope.population: Named reads, KV reuses, sparse edges, fanout schedules, state carries, and recurrent steps for declared requests, tenants, consumers, workloads, models, tokenizers, layouts, budgets, rights, and horizons.
scope.environment: Seven exact mappings; one schema fixture; three valid and six invalid synthetic traces; five public-safe Circle structural receipt slices; two proof targets; six finite declarations. No deployed cache, sparse-attention system, recurrence controller, useful-memory campaign, independent reproduction, or transfer result is represented.
scope.model: A memory-object-, state-version-, request-, consumer-, workload-, structural-axis-, budget-, environment-, and time-specific admission lease over authority, provenance, address/winding, freshness, coverage, fanout, recurrence, progress, work, fallback, invalidation, expiry, and residuals.
scope.authority: This chapter owns structural admission of a named state carry or recurrent step only. Context/VCM, Proof Transport, Runtime/Serving, Routing, Deliberation, Resources, Verification, Security/Privacy/Rights, Artifacts, Readiness/Incident, Claims/Evidence, and Release retain their boundaries.
scope.time: Semantic review current through 2026-07-14; source, state, request, model, tokenizer, layout, policy, authority, rights, threat, consumer, workload, or time changes expire affected leases.
scope.artifact: Chapter and manifest; seven mappings; schema and synthetic traces; five Circle receipts; two targets; six declarations; semantic review; and future natural causal-transfer campaign.

assumptions: State, source, authority, request, model, tokenizer, layout, epochs, address, winding, freshness, coverage, work, progress, fallback, rights, expiry, and residuals can be observed and versioned.
Strong full-attention, no-cache/recompute, FIFO/LRU, retrieval, recurrent, compressed-memory, state-space, fixed-depth, and direct baselines can run under matched information and resources.
Independent memory, recurrence, cache, scheduler, and evaluator implementations can measure structure, useful outcomes, resources, safety, rights, fallback, recovery, and residuals.
Stale, aliased, uncovered, duplicate, timed-out, OOM, fallback, recomputed, repaired, and refused cases remain in denominators.
Causal ablations, independent reproduction, and heterogeneous transfer can be frozen prospectively.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: Ordinary full attention, recomputation, standard caches, retrieval, recurrent models, and simple stopping already dominate; structural leases add overhead without improving useful memory, reasoning, safety, or recovery.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: Matched natural workloads show no unique joint benefit or reveal stale/alias/leakage, coverage, progress, fallback, cost, rights, reproduction, or transfer failures; or weak baselines, synthetic convenience, hidden maintenance, shared evaluators, or imported external results explain the apparent gain.

required_lanes.necessity: Freeze current memory, cache, recurrence, long-context, retrieval, and adaptive-compute comparators without importing reported results.
Justify non-widening authority, request isolation, deletion, rights, stopping, fallback, expiry, and residual ownership.
Specify state transitions, noninterference, invalidation, progress, liveness, budget conservation, fallback reachability, and runtime refinement beyond finite projections.
Run real cache, sparse, retrieval, recurrence, failure, fallback, invalidation, recovery, and attack behavior.
Measure structural events, useful retrieval/reasoning, calibration, tails, all resources, safety, rights, repair, recovery, and residuals jointly.
Ablate winding, provenance, freshness, repair, recurrent state, progress, stopping, and fallback under matched budgets.
Reproduce independently and transfer across tasks, lengths, models, hardware, organizations, attacks, rights regimes, and time.

contrary_evidence: The synthetic harness and all Circle slices establish structural record boundaries only, not deployed or learned behavior.
The sparse Circle fixture explicitly records incomplete coverage and substantial repair, not sparse-attention success.
Scheduled recurrence work savings are finite modeled quantities, not measured latency, memory, energy, or useful-compute gains.
Six declarations are two direct projections and four negative cases; none proves cache semantics, noninterference, progress, liveness, useful memory, or transfer.
No chapter-core transition, natural workload campaign, independent reproduction, or heterogeneous transfer exists.
known_confounds: Model, tokenizer, sequence length, task mix, cache layout, batching, hardware, kernel, retrieval index, and tuning can dominate outcomes.
Synthetic traces and fixed external receipts omit evolving request concurrency, poisoning, failures, drift, and deployment state.
Shared controller, cache implementation, evaluator, trace generator, or data can create false agreement.
Averages can hide rare cross-request leakage, aliasing, stale tails, coverage gaps, and overthinking.
Short horizons can miss invalidation lag, deletion failures, lock-in, maintenance, rebound compute, and recovery debt.
acceptance_criteria: Every lifecycle stage has a producer, consumer, valid case, rejecting mutation, consequence, recovery route, and residual owner.
A real reference slice executes natural memory and recurrence work with request isolation, authority, full baselines, failures, fallback, invalidation, recovery, and complete metrics.
The campaign clears joint useful-outcome, structural, safety, rights, tail, resource, recovery, causal, reproduction, and transfer gates.
Each mechanism produces its predicted signature under matched ablation without weak baselines, hidden work, censored failures, shared evaluation, or extra resources.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow every result to exact object, state, request, tenant, consumer, workload, model, tokenizer, layout, baseline, budget, evaluator, rights, environment, and horizon.
Separate structural validity, freshness, coverage, modeled work, cache behavior, retrieval, reasoning, resources, safety, deployment, transfer, and SOTA.
Unknown isolation, maintenance cost, delayed invalidation, fallback, recovery, reproduction, transfer, or rights remains residual or blocked.
refutation_criteria: Refute an invariant when reachable traces permit authority widening, cross-request reuse, hidden winding, stale admission, unreported gaps, duplicate inflation, self-extension, or broken fallback.
Refute a mechanism benefit when matched ablation preserves or improves the joint frontier or weak baselines, extra resources, hidden maintenance, synthetic traces, or shared evaluation explain it.
Refute retrieval, reasoning, context, efficiency, safety, deployment, transfer, or SOTA language when only structural evidence exists.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only when a more precise state-carry owner supersedes the atom and every state, lease, receipt, cache, descendant, transition, incident, residual, and consumer migrates with lineage.

reproduction.command: python3 scripts/validate_cyclic_memory_contracts.py && python3 scripts/validate_circle_cyclic_memory_receipt_slice.py && python3 scripts/validate_circle_kv_cache_receipt_slice.py && python3 scripts/validate_circle_sparse_attention_receipt_slice.py && python3 scripts/validate_circle_strided_fanout_receipt_slice.py && python3 scripts/validate_circle_recurrence_receipt_slice.py && cd lean && lake build AsiStackProofs.CoilAttentionMemory
reproduction.environment_lock: Local synthetic fixtures, imported public-safe Circle structural summaries, and finite module current through 2026-07-14; natural campaign not frozen or run.
reproduction.evaluator_identity: Current validators and imported summaries are local/authored or from one Circle checkout; independent cache, recurrence, scheduler, evaluator, attack, and transfer implementations are required.

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Freeze and run natural memory and recurrence workloads with strong matched controls, request isolation, complete costs, causal ablations, fallback/recovery, independent implementations/evaluators, and heterogeneous transfer.

non_claims: A source, theorem, schema, synthetic trace, external receipt, modeled work count, validator, or green build does not establish useful memory, retrieval, reasoning, context length, efficiency, safety, deployment, transfer, or SOTA.
No Circle or external recurrent-model result is imported as a local learned-memory result.
No support, release, AGI, or ASI state changes through this review.

coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurre.strongest_counterclaim: Ordinary memory and recurrence methods dominate without the structural lease.
coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurre.falsifier: Natural matched campaigns show no unique benefit or fail isolation, progress, cost, rights, recovery, reproduction, or transfer gates.

non_claims: Completing this sweep does not establish useful memory, retrieval, reasoning, context length, efficiency, safety, deployment, transfer, or SOTA.
The current fixtures, receipts, and declarations remain structural-only evidence.
No chapter-core support, release, AGI, or ASI state changes through this review.
